overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring the historic city of Saint Denis. The character moves from a sunlit cobblestone street through narrow plant-filled alleys and brick courtyards before emerging back onto a tree-lined avenue.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street past classical stone buildings with tall columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone street lined with classical stone buildings. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left as the character moves past commercial buildings with visible signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with tropical plants and brick walls

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow enclosed alleyway with brick walls and dense tropical vegetation. The lighting shifts to diffused shadows as the character approaches a stone archway leading deeper into the courtyard system.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with brick walls and archways

events.description: emerging from narrow passage into open courtyard with brick oven structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit inner courtyard with brick walls and stone paving

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a more open courtyard space, the character passes a large outdoor brick oven structure. The area features climbing vines on the walls and stone paving, with archways leading to other sections of the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner courtyard with wooden scaffolding and NPCs

events.description: wooden scaffolding structure comes into view in the courtyard

agents.ego_description: navigating through the courtyard passing by NPCs and wooden structures

series of brick archways along the building facade

metal spiked gate visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a populated courtyard area featuring wooden scaffolding and several NPCs standing about. The space has arched doorways and wooden barrels, with a metal exit gate visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alley leading to metal gate

events.description: entering narrow brick alleyway from open courtyard
character opens the metal spiked gate to exit the alley

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow alley toward the metal exit gate

entered.detail: tight brick walls closing in on both sides
narrow cobblestone passage floor
wooden ladder leaning against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark narrow brick alleyway with cobblestone flooring. The metal exit gate approaches as the character walks forward, eventually opening the gate to exit.

events.description: exiting the alley onto the tree-lined street
emerging from shadows into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: emerging onto the sunlit street and walking past pedestrians and a horse carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked along the curb

entered.detail: ornate historic buildings with arched windows across the street
open street with trees casting shadows on cobblestones
green striped awning over shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark alley onto a bright sunlit street lined with trees and historic buildings. A horse-drawn carriage is parked along the curb as the character continues walking along the cobblestone pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open city street through a series of secluded brick courtyards and back into the sunlight. It begins on a sunlit cobblestone street lined with classical stone buildings, passing a horse-drawn carriage before turning into a narrow, shadowed alleyway filled with dense tropical vegetation. As the character moves through a stone archway, the scene opens into a courtyard system featuring a large brick oven and climbing vines, eventually shifting into a populated area with wooden scaffolding and barrels. The camera then follows the character into a dark, narrow brick passage that leads toward a metal exit gate. Finally, the character opens the gate and emerges from the shadows back onto a bright, tree-lined avenue where another carriage sits parked along the curb.
